User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block admin routes from indexing
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/admin
Disallow: /dashboard/admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/pro
Disallow: /dashboard/homeowner
Disallow: /dashboard/recruiter
Disallow: /pros/login
Disallow: /pros/signup
Disallow: /recruiter/login
Disallow: /recruiter/signup
Disallow: /login/
Disallow: /signup/

Sitemap: https://www.fixloapp.com/sitemap.xml
